rationale: Silenced the trigger-ambiguity by pinning a single `#![trigger postN_self_.X_perms@[k]]` annotation on each per-key `assert forall`; the per-key body chains `wf`'s `is_init && addr == k` with the ensures' per-key value equality (re-asserted under explicit single triggers so the same instantiation strategy fires for both `post1_self_` and `post2_self_`), then lifts to `Map::=~=` via map extensionality and `Seq::=~=` for `cpu_list@`.
